{{Quote|Mining asteroids ain't like shooting kreetles, boy.|Koh|<ref name="RotW" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Koh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and senior officer in [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. He was primarily in charge of CEC's [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] activities in the [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|system]], but also oversaw CEC's activities on a few other [[Star system/Legends|systems]]. He had a militaristic attitude and demanded discipline and obedience from his employees. However, if they did their jobs well, he would give them substantial rewards including [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and various asteroid mining upgrades for their [[Starship/Legends|ships]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
